parameters.query:
INSERT INTO bot_sessions (
    telegram_user_id,
    chat_id,
    state,
    updated_at
)
VALUES (
    {{ $json.user_id }},
    {{ $json.chat_id }},
    'idle',
    now()
)
ON CONFLICT (telegram_user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
    chat_id = EXCLUDED.chat_id,
    updated_at = now()
RETURNING *;

UPDATE bot_sessions
SET
    state = 'generating_topics',
    topics_batch_no = topics_batch_no + 1,
    updated_at = now()
WHERE telegram_user_id = {{ $('Normalize Telegram Update').item.json.user_id }}
RETURNING *;

• 6 тем из LinkedIn

Подожди несколько секунд...

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO topic_batches (
    session_id,
    batch_no,
    source_mode
)
VALUES (
    {{ $('SQL create session').item.json.id }},
    {{ $('SQL create session').item.json.topics_batch_no }},
    'mixed'
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO post_topics (
    session_id,
    batch_id,
    batch_no,
    topic_no,
    title,
    explanation,
    relevance_now,
    source_type,
    source_company,
    source_url,
    source_signal,
    score
)
VALUES (
    {{ $json.session_id }},
    {{ $json.batch_id }},
    {{ $json.batch_no }},
    {{ $json.topic_no }},
    '{{ String($json.title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ String($json.explanation || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ String($json.relevance_now || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ String($json.source_type || 'linkedin').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.source_company ? "'" + String($json.source_company).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.source_url ? "'" + String($json.source_url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.source_signal ? "'" + String($json.source_signal).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.score || "NULL" }}
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO post_topics (
    session_id,
    batch_id,
    batch_no,
    topic_no,
    title,
    explanation,
    relevance_now,
    source_type,
    source_company,
    source_url,
    source_signal,
    score
)
VALUES (
    {{ $json.session_id }},
    {{ $json.batch_id }},
    {{ $json.batch_no }},
    {{ $json.topic_no }},
    '{{ String($json.title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ String($json.explanation || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ String($json.relevance_now || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ String($json.source_type || 'internet').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.source_company ? "'" + String($json.source_company).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.source_url ? "'" + String($json.source_url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.source_signal ? "'" + String($json.source_signal).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.score || "NULL" }}
)
RETURNING *;

SELECT
    id,
    session_id,
    batch_id,
    batch_no,
    topic_no,
    title,
    explanation,
    relevance_now,
    source_type,
    source_company,
    source_url,
    source_signal,
    score
FROM post_topics
WHERE session_id = {{ $json.session_id }}
  AND batch_id = {{ $json.batch_id }}
ORDER BY topic_no ASC;

WITH selected_topic AS (
    SELECT pt.*
    FROM post_topics pt
    JOIN bot_sessions bs ON bs.id = pt.session_id
    WHERE pt.id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
      AND bs.telegram_user_id = {{ $json.telegram_user_id }}
    LIMIT 1
),

clear_selection AS (
    UPDATE post_topics
    SET is_selected = false
    WHERE session_id = (SELECT session_id FROM selected_topic)
),

mark_topic AS (
    UPDATE post_topics
    SET is_selected = true
    WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM selected_topic)
    RETURNING *
),

update_session AS (
    UPDATE bot_sessions
    SET
        current_topic_id = (SELECT id FROM selected_topic),
        state = 'choosing_language',
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE id = (SELECT session_id FROM selected_topic)
    RETURNING *
)

SELECT
    t.id AS topic_id,
    t.session_id,
    t.batch_id,
    t.topic_no,
    t.title,
    t.explanation,
    t.relevance_now,
    t.source_type,
    t.source_company,
    s.telegram_user_id,
    s.chat_id,
    s.state
FROM mark_topic t
JOIN update_session s ON true;

UPDATE bot_sessions
SET
    selected_language = '{{ $json.language_code }}',
    state = 'generating_post',
    updated_at = now()
WHERE telegram_user_id = {{ $json.telegram_user_id }}
RETURNING
    id AS session_id,
    telegram_user_id,
    chat_id,
    state,
    current_topic_id,
    selected_language;

SELECT
    bs.id AS session_id,
    bs.telegram_user_id,
    bs.chat_id,
    bs.state,
    bs.selected_language,
    pt.id AS topic_id,
    pt.topic_no,
    pt.title,
    pt.explanation,
    pt.relevance_now,
    pt.source_type,
    pt.source_company,
    pt.source_url,
    pt.source_signal,
    pt.score
FROM bot_sessions bs
JOIN post_topics pt ON pt.id = bs.current_topic_id
WHERE bs.telegram_user_id = {{ $json.telegram_user_id }}
LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: SQL get selected topic for post

parameters.query:
WITH next_version AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1 AS version
    FROM generated_posts
    WHERE session_id = {{ $json.session_id }}
      AND topic_id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
),

insert_post AS (
    INSERT INTO generated_posts (
        session_id,
        topic_id,
        language,
        version,
        post_text,
        feedback
    )
    VALUES (
        {{ $json.session_id }},
        {{ $json.topic_id }},
        '{{ String($json.language || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        (SELECT version FROM next_version),
        '{{ String($json.post_text || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        NULL
    )
    RETURNING *
),

update_session AS (
    UPDATE bot_sessions
    SET
        current_post_id = (SELECT id FROM insert_post),
        state = 'generating_images',
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }}
    RETURNING *
)

SELECT
    p.id AS post_id,
    p.session_id,
    p.topic_id,
    p.language,
    p.version,
    p.post_text,
    s.chat_id,
    s.telegram_user_id,
    s.state
FROM insert_post p
JOIN update_session s ON true;

parameters.jsCode:
const post = $json;
const topic = $('SQL get selected topic for post').first().json;

const prompt = `
You are creating visual concepts for a LinkedIn post for a professional game development outsourcing and co-development studio.

Task:
Generate exactly 3 different image concepts that match the post topic and feel suitable for a professional LinkedIn audience.

Context:
- Industry: game development, game art, outsource production, co-development, live ops
- Audience: game founders, producers, studio heads, publishers, product owners
- The visual should support the post, not distract from it
- Prefer clean composition, strong concept, and business-appropriate visual language
- Avoid cliché stock-photo style
- Avoid childish visuals
- Avoid heavy text overlays
- Avoid logos of real companies
- Avoid copyrighted characters
- No text inside the image

Topic:
${topic.title}

Post text:
${post.post_text}

Requirements:
- Create 3 clearly different image concepts
- Each concept must be suitable for image generation
- Each concept should work as a LinkedIn post image
- Style: modern, polished, professional, game production / studio production vibe
- No text on image
- No real company logos
- No recognizable copyrighted game characters

Return ONLY valid JSON.
No markdown.
No explanations outside JSON.

JSON format:
{
  "image_concepts": [
    {
      "title": "...",
      "visual_concept": "...",
      "composition": "...",
      "style": "...",
      "image_prompt": "...",
      "why_it_matches": "..."
    }
  ]
}
`;

return [
  {
    json: {
      session_id: post.session_id,
      topic_id: post.topic_id,
      post_id: post.post_id,
      chat_id: post.chat_id,
      telegram_user_id: post.telegram_user_id,
      language: post.language,
      post_text: post.post_text,
      topic_title: topic.title,
      prompt
    }
  }
];

parameters.query:
UPDATE bot_sessions
SET
    images_batch_no = images_batch_no + 1,
    updated_at = now()
WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }}
RETURNING
    id AS session_id,
    telegram_user_id,
    chat_id,
    current_post_id,
    images_batch_no;

INSERT INTO generated_images (
    session_id,
    post_id,
    batch_no,
    image_no,
    prompt,
    image_url,
    file_path,
    is_selected
)
VALUES (
    {{ $json.session_id }},
    {{ $json.post_id }},
    {{ $json.image_batch_no }},
    {{ $json.image_no }},
    '{{ String($json.image_prompt || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    false
)
RETURNING
    id AS image_id,
    session_id,
    post_id,
    batch_no AS image_batch_no,
    image_no,
    prompt,
    image_url,
    file_path,
    is_selected,
    created_at;

UPDATE generated_images
SET
    file_path = '{{ String($json.file_path || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    image_url = NULL
WHERE id = {{ $json.image_id }}
RETURNING
    id AS image_id,
    session_id,
    post_id,
    batch_no AS image_batch_no,
    image_no,
    prompt,
    image_url,
    file_path,
    is_selected,
    created_at;

WITH selected_image AS (
    SELECT gi.*
    FROM generated_images gi
    JOIN bot_sessions bs ON bs.id = gi.session_id
    WHERE gi.id = {{ $json.image_id }}
      AND bs.telegram_user_id = {{ $json.telegram_user_id }}
    LIMIT 1
),

clear_images AS (
    UPDATE generated_images gi
    SET is_selected = false
    FROM selected_image si
    WHERE gi.session_id = si.session_id
      AND gi.post_id = si.post_id
    RETURNING gi.id
),

mark_image AS (
    UPDATE generated_images gi
    SET is_selected = true
    FROM selected_image si
    WHERE gi.id = si.id
    RETURNING gi.*
),

update_session AS (
    UPDATE bot_sessions bs
    SET
        current_image_id = (SELECT id FROM selected_image),
        state = 'preview',
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE bs.id = (SELECT session_id FROM selected_image)
    RETURNING bs.*
)

SELECT
    mi.id AS image_id,
    mi.session_id,
    mi.post_id,
    mi.batch_no AS image_batch_no,
    mi.image_no,
    mi.prompt,
    mi.file_path,

    us.telegram_user_id,
    us.chat_id,
    us.current_topic_id,
    us.current_post_id,
    us.current_image_id,
    us.selected_language,
    us.state

FROM mark_image mi
JOIN update_session us ON true;

SELECT
    bs.id AS session_id,
    bs.telegram_user_id,
    bs.chat_id,
    bs.state,
    bs.selected_language,

    pt.id AS topic_id,
    pt.title AS topic_title,
    pt.explanation AS topic_explanation,
    pt.relevance_now,
    pt.source_type,
    pt.source_company,

    gp.id AS post_id,
    gp.version AS post_version,
    gp.post_text,

    gi.id AS image_id,
    gi.image_no,
    gi.batch_no AS image_batch_no,
    gi.prompt AS image_prompt,
    gi.file_path AS image_path

FROM bot_sessions bs
JOIN post_topics pt ON pt.id = bs.current_topic_id
JOIN generated_posts gp ON gp.id = bs.current_post_id
JOIN generated_images gi ON gi.id = bs.current_image_id

WHERE bs.id = {{ $json.session_id }}
LIMIT 1;

WITH current_data AS (
    SELECT
        bs.id AS session_id,
        bs.telegram_user_id,
        bs.chat_id,
        bs.current_topic_id AS topic_id,
        bs.current_post_id AS post_id,
        bs.current_image_id AS image_id,
        bs.selected_language,
        gp.post_text AS final_text,
        gi.file_path AS final_image_path
    FROM bot_sessions bs
    JOIN generated_posts gp ON gp.id = bs.current_post_id
    JOIN generated_images gi ON gi.id = bs.current_image_id
    WHERE bs.telegram_user_id = {{ $('Normalize Telegram Update').first().json.user_id }}
      AND bs.state = 'preview'
    LIMIT 1
),

insert_approved AS (
    INSERT INTO approved_posts (
        session_id,
        topic_id,
        post_id,
        image_id,
        final_text,
        final_image_path,
        status,
        created_at
    )
    SELECT
        session_id,
        topic_id,
        post_id,
        image_id,
        final_text,
        final_image_path,
        'approved',
        now()
    FROM current_data
    RETURNING *
),

update_session AS (
    UPDATE bot_sessions bs
    SET
        state = 'idle',
        updated_at = now()
    FROM insert_approved a
    WHERE bs.id = a.session_id
    RETURNING
        bs.id,
        bs.telegram_user_id,
        bs.chat_id,
        bs.state
)

SELECT
    a.id AS approved_post_id,
    a.session_id,
    a.topic_id,
    a.post_id,
    a.image_id,
    a.status,
    a.final_image_path,
    s.chat_id,
    s.telegram_user_id,
    s.state
FROM insert_approved a
JOIN update_session s ON s.id = a.session_id;

parameters.query:
UPDATE bot_sessions
SET
    state = 'idle',
    current_topic_id = NULL,
    current_post_id = NULL,
    current_image_id = NULL,
    selected_language = NULL,
    updated_at = now()
WHERE telegram_user_id = {{ $('Normalize Telegram Update').first().json.user_id }}
RETURNING
    id AS session_id,
    telegram_user_id,
    chat_id,
    state;

UPDATE bot_sessions
SET
    state = 'revising_text',
    updated_at = now()
WHERE telegram_user_id = {{ $('Normalize Telegram Update').first().json.user_id }}
RETURNING
    id AS session_id,
    telegram_user_id,
    chat_id,
    state,
    current_topic_id,
    current_post_id,
    current_image_id,
    selected_language;

SELECT
    bs.id AS session_id,
    bs.telegram_user_id,
    bs.chat_id,
    bs.state,
    bs.selected_language,
    bs.current_topic_id,
    bs.current_post_id,
    bs.current_image_id,

    pt.title AS topic_title,
    pt.explanation AS topic_explanation,
    pt.relevance_now,
    pt.source_type,
    pt.source_company,
    pt.source_signal,

    gp.id AS post_id,
    gp.version AS current_version,
    gp.post_text AS current_post_text,

    gi.id AS image_id,
    gi.file_path AS image_path

FROM bot_sessions bs
JOIN post_topics pt ON pt.id = bs.current_topic_id
JOIN generated_posts gp ON gp.id = bs.current_post_id
JOIN generated_images gi ON gi.id = bs.current_image_id

WHERE bs.telegram_user_id = {{ $('Normalize Telegram Update').first().json.user_id }}
  AND bs.state = 'revising_text'
LIMIT 1;

WITH next_version AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1 AS version
    FROM generated_posts
    WHERE session_id = {{ $json.session_id }}
      AND topic_id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
),

insert_post AS (
    INSERT INTO generated_posts (
        session_id,
        topic_id,
        language,
        version,
        post_text,
        feedback
    )
    VALUES (
        {{ $json.session_id }},
        {{ $json.topic_id }},
        '{{ String($json.language || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        (SELECT version FROM next_version),
        '{{ String($json.post_text || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ String($json.feedback || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    )
    RETURNING *
),

update_session AS (
    UPDATE bot_sessions
    SET
        current_post_id = (SELECT id FROM insert_post),
        state = 'preview',
        updated_at = now()
    WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }}
    RETURNING *
)

SELECT
    p.id AS post_id,
    p.session_id,
    p.topic_id,
    p.language,
    p.version,
    p.post_text,
    p.feedback,
    s.chat_id,
    s.telegram_user_id,
    s.current_image_id,
    s.state
FROM insert_post p
JOIN update_session s ON true;

UPDATE bot_sessions
SET
    state = 'revising_image',
    updated_at = now()
WHERE telegram_user_id = {{ $('Normalize Telegram Update').first().json.user_id }}
RETURNING
    id AS session_id,
    telegram_user_id,
    chat_id,
    state,
    current_topic_id,
    current_post_id,
    current_image_id,
    selected_language;

SELECT
    bs.id AS session_id,
    bs.telegram_user_id,
    bs.chat_id,
    bs.state,
    bs.selected_language,
    bs.current_topic_id,
    bs.current_post_id,
    bs.current_image_id,

    pt.title AS topic_title,
    pt.explanation AS topic_explanation,
    pt.relevance_now,
    pt.source_type,
    pt.source_company,
    pt.source_signal,

    gp.id AS post_id,
    gp.version AS current_post_version,
    gp.post_text AS current_post_text,

    gi.id AS image_id,
    gi.batch_no AS current_image_batch_no,
    gi.image_no AS current_image_no,
    gi.prompt AS current_image_prompt,
    gi.file_path AS current_image_path

FROM bot_sessions bs
JOIN post_topics pt ON pt.id = bs.current_topic_id
JOIN generated_posts gp ON gp.id = bs.current_post_id
JOIN generated_images gi ON gi.id = bs.current_image_id

WHERE bs.telegram_user_id = {{ $('Normalize Telegram Update').first().json.user_id }}
  AND bs.state = 'revising_image'
LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: SQL update revised generated image file

parameters.query:
SELECT
    bs.id AS session_id,
    bs.telegram_user_id,
    bs.chat_id,
    bs.state,
    bs.selected_language,
    bs.current_topic_id,
    bs.current_post_id,
    bs.current_image_id,
    bs.images_batch_no,

    pt.title AS topic_title,
    pt.explanation AS topic_explanation,
    pt.relevance_now,
    pt.source_type,
    pt.source_company,
    pt.source_signal,

    gp.id AS post_id,
    gp.version AS current_post_version,
    gp.post_text AS current_post_text,

    selected_img.id AS selected_image_id,
    selected_img.prompt AS selected_image_prompt,
    selected_img.file_path AS selected_image_path,

    COALESCE(
        json_agg(
            json_build_object(
                'image_id', gi.id,
                'batch_no', gi.batch_no,
                'image_no', gi.image_no,
                'prompt', gi.prompt,
                'file_path', gi.file_path
            )
            ORDER BY gi.batch_no ASC, gi.image_no ASC
        ) FILTER (WHERE gi.id IS NOT NULL),
        '[]'::json
    ) AS previous_images

FROM bot_sessions bs
JOIN post_topics pt ON pt.id = bs.current_topic_id
JOIN generated_posts gp ON gp.id = bs.current_post_id

LEFT JOIN generated_images selected_img
    ON selected_img.id = bs.current_image_id

LEFT JOIN generated_images gi
    ON gi.post_id = bs.current_post_id

WHERE bs.telegram_user_id = {{ $('Normalize Telegram Update').first().json.user_id }}
  AND bs.current_post_id IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY
    bs.id,
    pt.id,
    gp.id,
    selected_img.id

LIMIT 1;

RETURNING

INSERT INTO generated_images (

)
VALUES (
    {{ $json.session_id }},

RETURNING

    post_id,
    batch_no AS image_batch_no,
    image_no,
    prompt,
    image_url,
    file_path,
    is_selected,
    created_at;

UPDATE generated_images
SET
    file_path = '{{ String($json.file_path || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    image_url = NULL
WHERE id = {{ $json.image_id }}
RETURNING
    id AS image_id,
    session_id,
    post_id,
    batch_no AS image_batch_no,
    image_no,
    prompt,
    image_url,
    file_path,
    is_selected,
    created_at;

nodes.name: SQL update more generated image file

parameters.query:
WITH previous AS (
    SELECT
        pt.id,
        pt.batch_no,
        pt.topic_no,
        pt.title,
        pt.explanation,
        pt.source_type,
        pt.source_company,
        pt.created_at
    FROM post_topics pt
    WHERE pt.session_id = {{ $('SQL create session').first().json.id }}
      AND pt.batch_id <> {{ $('SQL create topic_batch').first().json.id }}
    ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC, pt.id DESC
    LIMIT 36
)

SELECT
    COALESCE(
        json_agg(
            json_build_object(
                'batch_no', batch_no,
                'topic_no', topic_no,
                'title', title,
                'explanation', explanation,
                'source_type', source_type,
                'source_company', source_company
            )
        ),
        '[]'::json
    ) AS previous_topics,
    COUNT(*) AS previous_topics_count
FROM previous;

nodes.name: SQL get previous topics for anti-duplicate

parameters.query:
WITH all_chunks AS (
    SELECT
        c.id AS chunk_id,
        c.chunk_no,
        c.chunk_text,
        c.chunk_hash,
        s.company_key,
        s.company_name,
        s.company_url,
        s.category,
        md5(c.id::text || '-' || {{ $('SQL create topic_batch').first().json.batch_no }}) AS rotation_key
    FROM linkedin_source_chunks c
    JOIN linkedin_sources s ON s.id = c.source_id
    WHERE s.is_active = true
      AND c.is_active = true
),

ranked AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY company_key
            ORDER BY rotation_key
        ) AS rn_company,

        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY category
            ORDER BY rotation_key
        ) AS rn_category
    FROM all_chunks
),

balanced AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM ranked
    WHERE rn_company <= 2
      AND rn_category <= 8
),

selected AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM balanced
    ORDER BY md5(category || '-' || company_key || '-' || chunk_id::text || '-' || {{ $('SQL create topic_batch').first().json.batch_no }})
    LIMIT 30
)

SELECT
    COALESCE(
        json_agg(
            json_build_object(
                'chunk_id', chunk_id,
                'chunk_no', chunk_no,
                'chunk_text', chunk_text,
                'company_key', company_key,
                'company_name', company_name,
                'company_url', company_url,
                'category', category
            )
        ),
        '[]'::json
    ) AS linkedin_chunks,
    COUNT(*)::int AS selected_chunks
FROM selected;
